title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Deloitte India Digital Technologies in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Deloitte India Digital Technologies:
Deloitte India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
